resources.notes: Anchor: creating/accessing by key, add/modify/delete (assignment, del, pop), looping items()/keys()/values(), get() and setdefault().
Dictionary comprehension: building and inverting dictionaries, filtering; curly-brace key:value syntax vs list comprehension.
Nested dictionaries: dictionaries within dictionaries, beginner-level access patterns.

web_search_query: Python dictionaries CRUD get setdefault comprehension nested beginners
